title: Revenue Operations / GTM Engineering
requestedWorkflow: Research the account, decide whether this is a qualified GTM engineering workflow, draft a human-approved follow-up, and prepare an Attio CRM update behind approval.
message: Notion row from the GTM team: Pylon is evaluating Clay-style account research and AI SDR reliability. The pain is knowing which buyer signals are real, routing them to the right owner, preserving context, and avoiding unsafe autonomous sending.
